name: rolepod
description: 16-agent dev team workflow with simplicity gates, test gates, and verify-first discipline. Codex plugin ships skills + hooks; the 16 agents install to ~/.codex/agents/ (Codex's plugin loader has no agents field).

interface.shortDescription: 16-agent dev team with gates and verify-first discipline.
interface.longDescription: Rolepod gives Codex a 16-specialist dev team (engineering, quality, design, ops, strategy, content) plus simplicity / test / triage gates that fire before every commit. The plugin bundles skills and hooks; the 16 agents install to ~/.codex/agents/ (Codex loads agents from there, not from a plugin).
defaultPrompt: Use Rolepod to turn my feature idea into a clear spec, plan, implementation path, and verification checklist.
